stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯。: Add all ingredients into the mixing glass.
stepsEn.过滤入预先冰镇的马天尼杯。: Strain into a chilled martini glass.
stepsEn.在杯口置放开槽调酒勺。: Place a channel bar spoon on the rim of the glass.
stepsEn.将方糖置于勺上，缓慢将冰冷的水滴淋其上，直至方糖完全溶解并落入杯中。: Place a sugar cube on the spoon, slowly drip cold water over it until the sugar cube completely dissolves and falls into the glass.
stepsEn.用勺轻拌使其进一步融合后享用。: Gently stir with the spoon to further integrate before enjoying.
stepsEn.将冰镇苏打水倒入已冰镇的小费兹杯或柯林斯杯。: Pour chilled soda water into a chilled small fizz or Collins glass.
stepsEn.其余配料入调酒杯，干摇5秒。: Add the remaining ingredients into the shaker and dry shake for 5 seconds.
stepsEn.加冰再摇10秒。: Add ice and shake for another 10 seconds.
stepsEn.滤入杯中，并用吧勺短拌以融合。: Strain into the glass and gently stir with a bar spoon to integrate.
stepsEn.将所有配料倒入搅拌机，搅打至顺滑呈冰沙状。: Pour all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth and slushy.
stepsEn.倒入小号葡萄酒杯或有脚平底杯（传统苦艾杯）。: Pour into a small wine glass or a stemmed tumbler (traditional absinthe glass).
stepsEn.将全部配料加入调酒杯，加冰搅拌30秒。: Add all ingredients into the mixing glass and stir with ice for 30 seconds.
stepsEn.纽约版：滤入装满碎冰或颗粒冰的碟形香槟杯。: New York style: Strain into a coupe glass filled with crushed or pebble ice.
stepsEn.加州版：滤入小水杯或小费兹杯（不加冰），再加入3 oz 冰镇苏打水。: California style: Strain into a small rocks glass or small fizz glass (no ice), then add 3 oz chilled soda water.
stepsEn.将除苏打水外的所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰充分摇匀。: Add all ingredients except soda water into the shaker, add ice and shake thoroughly.
stepsEn.双重过滤入装满碎冰或刨冰的古典杯。: Double strain into an Old Fashioned glass filled with crushed or shaved ice.
stepsEn.除姜汁啤酒外的所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰充分摇匀。: Add all ingredients except ginger beer into a shaker and shake well with ice.
stepsEn.滤入装有大冰块的柯林斯杯。: Strain into a Collins glass filled with large ice cubes.
stepsEn.加入姜汁啤酒，轻轻搅拌融合。: Add ginger beer and gently stir to combine.
stepsEn.用手压榨汁器将青柠直接压入调酒杯，并加入用过的果皮。: Squeeze lime directly into the shaker using a citrus press and add the used peel.
stepsEn.除苏打水外加入其他配料，加冰充分摇匀。: Add all ingredients except soda water, and shake well with ice.
stepsEn.加入苏打水，轻拌融合。: Add soda water and gently stir to combine.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰搅拌15秒以融合。: Add all ingredients into a shaker and stir with ice for 15 seconds to combine.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰搅拌30秒。: Add all ingredients into a shaker and stir with ice for 30 seconds.
stepsEn.以橙皮装饰：用开槽刀沿整颗橙子环绕削取一条细长橙皮，垂挂于杯沿如猫尾。: Garnish with an orange twist: Use a channel knife to cut a long thin orange peel around the entire orange and hang it on the rim like a cat's tail.
stepsEn.橙皮（细长条，垂挂杯沿）: Orange twist (long thin strip hanging on the rim)
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰充分摇匀。: Add all ingredients into a shaker and shake well with ice.
stepsEn.双重过滤入预先冰镇的马天尼杯。: Double strain into a pre-chilled martini glass.
stepsEn.将配料加入调酒杯，加冰搅拌30秒。: Add the ingredients into the mixing glass. Stir with ice for 30 seconds.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。: Add all ingredients into the mixing glass.
stepsEn.加入冰块并搅拌30秒。: Add ice and stir for 30 seconds.
stepsEn.过滤至冰镇的马天尼杯中。: Strain into a chilled martini glass.
stepsEn.将水果和苦精加入调酒玻璃杯中并捣碎。: Add fruit and bitters into the mixing glass and muddle.
stepsEn.双重过滤至冰镇的马天尼杯中。: Double strain into a chilled martini glass.
stepsEn.将金酒和黑可可利口酒加入调酒玻璃杯中。: Add gin and black Crème de Cacao into the mixing glass.
stepsEn.加入冰块并搅拌20秒。: Add ice and stir for 20 seconds.
stepsEn.过滤至冰镇的雪利酒杯中。: Strain into a chilled sherry glass.
stepsEn.用吧勺背面将淡奶油缓慢漂浮在顶层。: Slowly float the light cream on top using the back of a bar spoon.
stepsEn.用橙皮和柠檬皮装饰。: Garnish with orange twist and lemon twist.
stepsEn.将除普罗塞克外的所有配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。: Add all ingredients except Prosecco into the mixing glass.
stepsEn.过滤至冰镇的香槟碟形杯中。: Strain into a chilled champagne coupe.
stepsEn.将配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。: Add ingredients to the mixing glass.
stepsEn.将薄荷和苦精加入柯林斯杯中，轻轻捣碎以释放香气。: Add mint and bitters to a Collins glass and gently muddle to release the aroma.
stepsEn.然后加入柠檬汁和金酒。: Then add lemon juice and gin.
stepsEn.加满冰块并加入干姜水。: Fill with ice and add ginger ale.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯，加入冰并充分摇匀。: Add all ingredients to the shaker, add ice, and shake well.
stepsEn.滤入已冷却的碟形杯（鸡尾酒杯）。: Strain into a chilled coupe glass.
stepsEn.装饰并放入白兰地樱桃。: Garnish and add a brandy cherry.
stepsEn.滤入装有碎冰或刨冰的古典杯或碟形香槟杯。: Strain into an old fashioned glass or coupe glass filled with crushed or shaved ice.
stepsEn.用橙皮点缀，释放橙皮油后放入杯中；随杯附小金属吸管上桌。: Garnish with an orange twist; express the orange oils over the glass and add the twist; serve with a small metal straw.
stepsEn.滤入已冷却的碟形鸡尾酒杯。: Strain into a chilled coupe cocktail glass.
stepsEn.滤入装有刨冰或碎冰的碟形杯或杯中。: Strain into a coupe glass or glass filled with shaved or crushed ice.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入混合杯，加入冰并搅拌约30秒以充分整合。: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass, add ice and stir with ice for 30 seconds to fully integrate.
stepsEn.滤入已冷却的碟形杯。: Strain into a chilled coupe glass.
stepsEn.用橙皮装饰（作者建议用橙皮以提升风味）。: Garnish with an orange twist (the author recommends using an orange twist to enhance the flavor).
stepsEn.将朗姆酒与所选的干或甜苦艾酒加入混合杯，加入冰并搅拌约30秒。: Add rum and the chosen dry or sweet vermouth into a mixing glass, add ice and stir for about 30 seconds.
stepsEn.可在杯边喷洒新鲜橙或柠檬皮以增香。: Spray fresh orange or lemon peel around the glass rim to enhance aroma.
stepsEn.将橙皮在古典杯上扭出油，放入杯中。: Express the oils of the orange peel over the old fashioned glass and drop it into the glass.
stepsEn.加入苦精并稍微捣揉以释放风味。: Add bitters and gently muddle to release the flavors.
stepsEn.将金酒与干/甜苦艾酒倒入同一杯中，加入冰并搅拌以整合风味。: Pour gin and dry/sweet vermouth into the same glass, add ice and stir to integrate the flavors.
stepsEn.可再添加额外橙皮作为装饰。: Additional orange twist can be added as garnish.
stepsEn.在装有大冰块的古典杯中加入所有材料，短暂搅拌以整合风味。: Add all ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with large ice cubes, stir briefly to integrate flavors.
stepsEn.用橙皮装饰并上桌。: Garnish with an orange twist and serve.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入混合杯，加入冰并搅拌约15秒以整合。: Add all ingredients into a mixing glass, add ice and stir for about 15 seconds to integrate.
stepsEn.滤入装有大冰块或球冰的古典杯。: Strain into an old fashioned glass filled with large or sphere ice.
stepsEn.可用白兰地樱桃装饰。: Can be garnished with brandied cherries.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入混合杯，加入冰并搅拌约30秒。: Add all ingredients into a mixing glass, add ice and stir for about 30 seconds.
stepsEn.将冷却的苏打水倒入小柯林斯或菲兹杯备用。: Pour chilled soda water into a small Collins or fizz glass and set aside.
stepsEn.将其余配料加入调酒杯，先干摇约5秒以乳化蛋白。: Add the remaining ingredients into a shaker, dry shake for about 5 seconds to emulsify the egg white.
stepsEn.加入冰再摇约10秒。: Add ice and shake for about 10 seconds.
stepsEn.将混合物滤入已装苏打水的菲兹杯中，轻轻搅拌以整合（无额外装饰）。: Double strain the mixture into the fizz glass containing soda water, gently stir to integrate (No garnish).

stepsEn.将剩余配料加入调酒杯。: Add the remaining ingredients into a mixing glass.
stepsEn.过滤至冰镇马天尼杯中。: Strain into a chilled martini glass.

stepsEn.加入大方冰，注满苏打水。: Add large ice cubes and fill with soda water.
stepsEn.以橙皮（或柠檬皮）装饰。: Garnish with an orange twist (or lemon twist).
stepsEn.将除苏打水外的所有配料加入调酒杯。: Add all ingredients except soda water into the shaker.
stepsEn.双重过滤至装满标准方冰的柯林斯杯中。: Double strain into a Collins glass filled with standard large ice cubes.

stepsEn.短暂捣碎以释放精华。: Muddle briefly to release the oils.
stepsEn.用一枝百里香横放在杯口装饰。: Garnish with a sprig of thyme laid across the rim.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰搅拌30秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 装饰： l: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon peel.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰搅拌30秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 装饰： o: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with an orange twist.
stepsEn.Add bitters, radish, and cucumber slices: Add bitters, radish, and cucumber slices to a mixing glass. Muddle to break down and release flavors. Add vodka and syrup. Add ice and shake well. If rimming the glass, moisten half of the cocktail glass with a lemon wedge, then roll that side of the glass in the spice mixture. Double strain into the prepared glass. Garnish with a radish wheel (if not salting the rim).
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰充分摇匀。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 装饰： fr: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with fresh raspberries.
stepsEn.Add all ingredients to mixing glass and: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass and dry shake without ice for 5 seconds. Add ice and shake for 10 seconds. Double strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon peel.
stepsEn.Add all ingredients except bitters to Co: Add all ingredients except bitters to a Collins glass. Fill with pellet ice. Swizzle or stir with a bar spoon for 10 seconds, bringing the ice from the bottom to the top to ensure ingredients are well integrated and chilled. Top with bitters and serve with a straw.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰搅拌30秒。 Strain into Old Fa: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 30 seconds. Strain into an Old Fashioned glass over large ice cubes or a sphere. Garnish with a lemon peel.
stepsEn.将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰搅拌15秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 装饰： l: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 15 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon peel.
stepsEn.将冰镇苏打水加入小柯林斯杯或平底杯中。: Add chilled soda water to a small Collins glass or rocks glass.
stepsEn.将剩余配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。: Add remaining ingredients to a mixing glass.
stepsEn.双重过滤至冰镇的柯林斯杯中。: Double strain into a chilled Collins glass.
stepsEn.将糖和冷水加入冰镇的古典杯中。: Add sugar and cold water to a chilled Old Fashioned glass.
stepsEn.将柠檬挤汁入杯。: Squeeze lemon juice into the glass.
stepsEn.丢弃柠檬壳并搅拌均匀。: Discard the lemon peel and stir well.
stepsEn.加入威士忌和大方冰。: Add whiskey and large ice cubes.
stepsEn.短暂搅拌均匀，然后用吧勺背面缓慢倒入红酒使其漂浮在表面。: Stir briefly to combine, then slowly pour red wine over the back of a bar spoon to float it on top.
stepsEn.在调酒玻璃杯中加冰。: Add ice to a mixing glass.
stepsEn.Add ingredients to mixing glass. Add ice: Add ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled martini glass.
stepsEn.Add ice and shake well. 过滤至装满碎冰的冰镇马天尼杯中。: Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled martini glass filled with crushed ice.
stepsEn.用一片鲜草莓装饰。: Garnish with a fresh strawberry slice.
stepsEn.Add ice and stir for 15 seconds to integ: Add ice and stir for 15 seconds to integrate. Strain into a stemmed glass or Old Fashioned glass filled with crushed ice.
stepsEn.加冰搅拌15秒。: Add ice and stir for 15 seconds.
stepsEn.Add ice and shake well. 过滤至冰镇的马天尼杯中。: Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled martini glass.
stepsEn.Add ice and shake well. 过滤至装有大方冰或球冰的古典杯中: Add ice and shake well. Strain into an Old Fashioned glass filled with large ice cubes or a sphere.
stepsEn.用一颗八角漂浮在表面装饰。: Garnish with a star anise floating on the surface.
stepsEn.将除苏打水外的所有配料加入调酒杯中。: Add all ingredients except soda water into the mixing glass.
stepsEn.将前三种配料加入调酒杯中。: Add the first three ingredients into the mixing glass.
stepsEn.双重过滤至冰镇的古典杯中。: Double strain into a chilled old-fashioned glass.
stepsEn.在中心加入一撮五香粉作为装饰。: Garnish with a pinch of five-spice powder in the center.
stepsEn.扭转橙皮释放油脂，然后丢弃。: Twist the orange peel to release oils, then discard.
